SlimeWire
🧭 Hub🐸 Swamp🔥 Raids📡 RadarTerminal

👥 Swamp Crews

Your Telegram or X group is a crew. Tag in, and everything your members catch, raid and survive adds to your crew's score. Bring your friends — biggest crew wins.

1. Tag your crewSet the same clan tag in the Swamp (Clan Camp) and on /raids.
2. Grind togetherCatches, raids and survival from every member stack into the crew total.
3. Climb the boardTop crews get featured. Recruit your group to climb.

Start your crew

Pick a tag, drop it in your TG/X group, and have everyone set it. Watch your crew climb.

🐸 Set your clan in the Swamp
